result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 10:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                                ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH filtered_history AS (
  SELECT
    ch.id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM filtered_history
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
case_handles AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT owner_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
)
SELECT t.agent_id
FROM transfers t
JOIN case_handles h ON h.owner_id = t.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) > 0
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH filtered_history AS (
  SELECT
    ch.id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM filtered_history
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
case_handles AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT owner_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
)
SELECT t.agent_id
FROM transfers t
JOIN case_handles h ON h.owner_id = t.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) > 0
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH filtered_history AS (
  SELECT
    ch.id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM filtered_history
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
case_handles AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT owner_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
)
SELECT t.agent_id
FROM transfers t
JOIN case_handles h ON h.owner_id = t.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) > 0
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH filtered_history AS (
  SELECT
    ch.id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM filtered_history
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
case_handles AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT owner_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
)
SELECT t.agent_id
FROM transfers t
JOIN case_handles h ON h.owner_id = t.agent_id
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c='Owner'
  AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c='Owner'
  AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00';

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_total FROM casehistory__c;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_total FROM casehistory__c;

args.query:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH filtered_history AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM filtered_history
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT owner_id FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id FROM filtered_history WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) u
)
SELECT t.agent_id
FROM transfers t
JOIN handled h ON h.owner_id=t.agent_id
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
